title: BEM-683 continue approval
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
mailbox_out=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude'); mailbox_out.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
active=Path('governance/agreements/active'); active.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

# Search for explicit Claude final decision on BEM-682.
inbound_dirs=[Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]
responses=[]
for d in inbound_dirs:
    if d.exists():
        for f in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if f.is_file():
                txt=read(f)
                low=(f.name+' '+txt).lower()
                if 'bem682' in low or 'bem-682' in low or 'final decision' in low or 'consolidated protocol' in low:
                    decision='UNKNOWN'
                    up=txt.upper()
                    if 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up or 'APPROVE' in up:
                        decision='APPROVE'
                    elif 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
                        decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up:
                        decision='BLOCKED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(f),'decision':decision,'preview':txt[:1200]})

approved=any(x['decision']=='APPROVE' for x in responses)
change_required=any(x['decision']=='CHANGE_REQUIRED' for x in responses)
blocked=any(x['decision']=='BLOCKED' for x in responses)

if approved:
    status='approved_by_claude'
    next_action='create_final_protocol_and_operator_summary'
    blocker=None
elif change_required:
    status='change_required_by_claude'
    next_action='apply_claude_changes_and_resubmit'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_CHANGE_REQUIRED','responses':responses}
else:
    status='awaiting_claude_final_decision'
    next_action='keep_agreement_active_and_send_final_decision_required_notice'
    blocker=None

# Keep active agreement file; this prevents treating the task as closed while waiting.
active_file=active/'bem682_multi_agent_infrastructure_agreement_active.json'
active_state={'schema_version':'active_agreement.v1','agreement_id':'BEM-682','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses':responses,'created_or_updated_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)','blocker':blocker}
active_file.write_text(json.dumps(active_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

# If no final decision, send a concise reminder to Claude in mailbox.
reminder_file=None
if status=='awaiting_claude_final_decision':
    reminder=mailbox_out/'bem683_final_decision_required_for_bem682.md'
    reminder.write_text('# BEM-683 | FINAL DECISION REQUIRED | BEM-682 CONSOLIDATED PROTOCOL'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Claude, please give explicit final decision for `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem682_consolidated_protocol_for_claude_final_approval.md`.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-682 | CLAUDE FINAL DECISION'+sep+'Decision: APPROVE / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Changes: <if any>'+sep+'Blocker: <if any or null>'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
    reminder_file=str(reminder)

state={'schema_version':'continue_until_claude_final_decision.v1','bem':'BEM-683','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses':responses,'active_file':str(active_file),'reminder_file':reminder_file,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem683_continue_until_claude_final_decision.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem683_continue_until_claude_final_decision.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-683 | Continue Until Claude Final Decision | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Next action: '+next_action+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Active agreement: '+str(active_file)+sep+'Reminder: '+str(reminder_file)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem683_continue_until_claude_final_decision','cycle_id':'bem683-continue-until-claude-final-decision','source':'gpt_agreement_monitor','status':status,'next_action':next_action,'responses_found':len(responses),'active_file':str(active_file),'reminder_file':reminder_file,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem683_continue_until_claude_final_decision']={'status':status,'next_action':next_action,'active_file':str(active_file),'reminder_file':reminder_file,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['infrastructure_protocol_agreement_status']=status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 19:59 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem683_continue_until_claude_final_decision.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-683: '+status+' next_action='+next_action+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(active_file),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)] + ([reminder_file] if reminder_file else []))
ops_applied.append('Continued BEM-682 agreement loop by checking Claude final decision, keeping active agreement state, and sending final-decision-required reminder if needed')
"""
No issue comments.
